Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotChart

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotElement
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotChart
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPotElement
public class PotChart extends PotElement
Represents a chart element within a PowerPoint slide.

This class provides a wrapper around an Apache POI XSLFChart and its containing graphic frame, enabling fluent manipulation of the chart's position, size, rotation, and visual effects. It inherits common shape manipulation capabilities from PotElement and returns PotChart from chainable methods for convenient builder-style usage. Direct duplication of chart elements is not supported and will throw an exception.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Constructor Details

    • PotChart

      public PotChart(org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFGraphicFrame shape, org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFChart chart, PotSlide parentSlide, String uuid)
      Constructs a new PotChart instance.

      Initializes the chart element by associating the provided POI objects and identifiers. The underlying shape must be an XSLFGraphicFrame that contains the specified chart.

      Parameters:
      shape - the POI graphic frame shape that contains the chart
      chart - the POI chart object representing the chart data and formatting
      parentSlide - the parent slide that contains this chart element
      uuid - the unique identifier for this element

  • Method Details

    • getChart

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFChart getChart()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI chart object.

      This method provides direct access to the POI XSLFChart instance, allowing for low-level chart data and formatting manipulations that are not covered by the higher-level PotChart API.

      Returns:
      the XSLFChart instance associated with this element

    • at

      public PotChart at(double x, double y)
      Sets the position of this chart element to the specified coordinates.

      This method updates both the X and Y coordinates of the chart's anchor point simultaneously. The coordinates are typically in points relative to the slide's top-left corner. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Usage Example

      
 PotChart chart = slide.addChart(...);
 chart.at(100.0, 150.0);
      Overrides:
      at in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      x - the new X-coordinate for the chart
      y - the new Y-coordinate for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • position(double, double)
      • setX(double)
      • setY(double)

    • setX

      public PotChart setX(double x)
      Sets the X-coordinate of this chart element.

      Updates the horizontal position of the chart's anchor point. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Overrides:
      setX in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      x - the new X-coordinate for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • at(double, double)
      • x(double)

    • x

      public PotChart x(double x)
      Sets the X-coordinate of this chart element (fluent alias for setX(double)).

      This method provides a fluent-style alternative to setX. It updates the horizontal position and returns this instance for chaining.

      Overrides:
      x in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      x - the new X-coordinate for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining

      Updates the vertical position of the chart's anchor point. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Overrides:

      Parameters:
      y - the new Y-coordinate for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • at(double, double)
      • y(double)

    • y

      public PotChart y(double y)
      Sets the Y-coordinate of this chart element (fluent alias for setY(double)).

      This method provides a fluent-style alternative to setY. It updates the vertical position and returns this instance for chaining.

      Overrides:
      y in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      y - the new Y-coordinate for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • setY(double)
      • at(double, double)

    • position

      public PotChart position(double x, double y)
      Sets the position of this chart element to the specified coordinates.

      This method updates both the X and Y coordinates of the chart's anchor point simultaneously. It is functionally equivalent to at(double, double) and is provided for API consistency. The method is chainable.

      Overrides:
      position in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      x - the new X-coordinate for the chart
      y - the new Y-coordinate for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • at(double, double)

    • size

      public PotChart size(double width, double height)
      Sets the width and height of this chart element.

      This method updates the dimensions of the chart's bounding rectangle simultaneously. The dimensions are typically specified in points. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Usage Example

      
 PotChart chart = slide.addChart(...);
 chart.size(300.0, 200.0);
      Overrides:
      size in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      width - the new width for the chart
      height - the new height for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • setWidth(double)
      • setHeight(double)

    • setWidth

      public PotChart setWidth(double width)
      Sets the width of this chart element.

      Updates the horizontal dimension of the chart's bounding rectangle. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Overrides:
      setWidth in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      width - the new width for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • size(double, double)
      • width(double)

      Sets the width of this chart element (fluent alias for setWidth(double)).

      This method provides a fluent-style alternative to setWidth. It updates the width and returns this instance for chaining.

      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Updates the vertical dimension of the chart's bounding rectangle. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Parameters:
      height - the new height for the chart

      this PotChart instance for method chaining

    • height

      public PotChart height(double height)
      Sets the height of this chart element (fluent alias for setHeight(double)).

      This method provides a fluent-style alternative to setHeight. It updates the height and returns this instance for chaining.

      Overrides:
      height in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      height - the new height for the chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • setHeight(double)
      • size(double, double)

    • rotate

      public PotChart rotate(double angle)
      Sets the rotation angle of this chart element.

      This method rotates the chart around its center by the specified angle, measured in degrees clockwise. The method is chainable, returning this PotChart instance.

      Usage Example

      
 PotChart chart = slide.addChart(...);
 chart.rotate(45.0); // Rotates the chart 45 degrees clockwise
      Overrides:
      rotate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees clockwise
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • rotation(double)

    • rotation

      public PotChart rotation(double angle)
      Sets the rotation angle of this chart element (fluent alias for rotate(double)).

      This method provides a fluent-style alternative to rotate. It sets the rotation angle and returns this instance for chaining.

      Overrides:
      rotation in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees clockwise
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • rotate(double)

    • duplicate

      public PotChart duplicate()
      Throws an UnsupportedOperationException as chart duplication is not supported.

      This operation is intentionally unsupported for PotChart instances due to complexities in duplicating chart data and formatting within the underlying POI model. Attempting to call this method will always result in an exception.

      Specified by:
      duplicate in interface IPotElement
      Overrides:
      duplicate in class PotElement
      Returns:
      nothing; this method always throws an exception
      Throws:
      PotException - always, with an "unsupported operation" message
      See Also:
      • PotException.unsupportedOperation(String)

    • animate

      public PotChart animate(PotAnimation animation)
      Applies an animation to this chart element.

      This method associates the specified animation with the chart, which will be played during slide show presentation according to the animation's timing and effect properties. The method delegates to the parent class implementation and is chainable.

      Overrides:
      animate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      animation - the animation to apply to this chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.animate(PotAnimation)

    • hyperlink

      public PotChart hyperlink(PotHyperlink link)
      Attaches a hyperlink to this chart element.

      This method sets a hyperlink that will be activated when the chart is clicked during a slide show. The hyperlink can point to a URL, another slide, or a custom action. The method delegates to the parent class implementation and is chainable.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      link - the hyperlink to attach to this chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.hyperlink(PotHyperlink)

    • shadow

      public PotChart shadow(PotShadow shadow)
      Applies a shadow effect to this chart element.

      This method sets a visual shadow effect for the chart, controlling properties such as blur, distance, angle, and color. The method delegates to the parent class implementation and is chainable.

      Overrides:
      shadow in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      shadow - the shadow effect to apply to this chart
      Returns:
      this PotChart instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • PotElement.shadow(PotShadow)

    • getRawShape

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFGraphicFrame getRawShape()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI graphic frame shape that contains this chart.

      This method provides direct access to the POI XSLFGraphicFrame instance that serves as the container for the chart. This can be useful for low-level manipulations of the shape's properties not exposed by the PotChart API.

      Overrides:
      getRawShape in class PotElement
      Returns:
      the XSLFGraphicFrame instance that contains this chart
      See Also:
      • PotElement.getRawShape()
